e	yJ
)!zHConversions to/from quoted-printable transport encoding as per RFC 1521.)
encode
decode
encodestring
decodestring
0123456789ABCDEF
a2b_qp
b2a_qpNc
Decide whether a particular byte ordinal needs to be quoted.
    The 'quotetabs' flag indicates whether embedded tabs and spaces should be
    quoted.  Note that line-ending tabs and spaces are always encoded, as per
    RFC 1521.
    
ESCAPE)
	quotetabs
header
/usr/lib64/python3.9/quopri.py
needsquoting
Quote a single character.
ordr
bytes
quote$
qz|	
Read 'input', apply quoted-printable encoding, and write to 'output'.
    'input' and 'output' are binary file objects. The 'quotetabs' flag
    indicates whether embedded tabs and spaces should be quoted. Note that
    line-ending tabs and spaces are always encoded, as per RFC 1521.
    The 'header' flag indicates whether we are encoding spaces as _ as per RFC
    1522.N
writer
output
lineEndr
encode.<locals>.writer
readr 
readliner
append
EMPTYSTRING
join
MAXLINESIZE)
inputr"
data
odatar 
prevline
lineZ
outline
strippedr
thisliner
BytesIO)
ior2
getvalue)
infp
outfpr
|	s.|
Read 'input', apply quoted-printable decoding, and write to 'output'.
    'input' and 'output' are binary file objects.
    If 'header' is true, decode underscore as space (per RFC 1522).N
)	r	
ishexr
unhex)
newr/
partialr
zDReturn true if the byte ordinal 'c' is a hexadecimal digit in ASCII.
n&d	|
z.Get the integer value of a hexadecimal number.r
